headline: Basin rig count up one as prices soar
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was up one this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 241 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 304 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is up one from last week at 551 rigs. A year ago, 592 rigs were active. The count shows that 411 rigs sought oil, up four from the previous week, and 132 explored for ...
